_instructions: Ordered list of schematic page slugs. This is the ONE place that registers which schematic
systems exist and what order they appear in (sidebar submenu, mobile tab bar, and the
Home page's schematic card, which all read this list at runtime).
Each slug must match a filename in this folder (slug.json) and that file's own 'id' field.
TO ADD A NEW SYSTEM: create public/schematics/<slug>.json (see README.md), then add <slug> here.
TO REMOVE OR REORDER: delete or move its entry below. No .vue or .ts file needs to change.
NOTE: the bare '/schematic' URL (no slug) still redirects to a hardcoded default in
src/router/index.ts, since that redirect resolves before this file can be fetched - update
that one line too if you want a different default landing page.
